name: kk-dev-skeleton-adoption
description: Codex workflow for adopting and upgrading KK Dev Skeleton runtime bundles.

interface.shortDescription: Guide Codex through KK Dev Skeleton adoption and runtime upgrades.
interface.longDescription: Provides a natural-language Codex workflow for detecting, planning, applying, validating, verifying, and reporting KK Dev Skeleton adapter, portable core, and explicit runtime bundle adoption.
defaultPrompt: 同步 KK Dev Skeleton runtime bundle
